# Imagined Inventory: auth-settings

**Project:** tradeguruelectrical
**Created:** 2026-03-15
**Generated by:** `/imagine-inventory`
**Vision:** Industry-standard WorkOS OAuth authentication with Settings screen, token management, device linking, and tier-based access — safe, reliable, robust, cross-platform ready

---

## Instructions

This is a **forward-looking TODO inventory**. The backend is fully built (WorkOS proxy, JWT validation, device linking, quotas, analytics). This inventory covers only what the **Swift app** needs to connect to it.

### Status definitions
| Status | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| `todo` | Not started — needs to be built |
| `done` | Built and working |
| `blocked` | Can't start until dependency is done |

## Inventory

### model — Data types (all nonisolated, Codable)

| # | Name | File (planned) | Status | Purpose | Depends On |
|---|------|---------------|--------|---------|------------|
| 1 | AuthState | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Models/AuthState.swift` | todo | Enum: `.anonymous(deviceId)`, `.authenticated(user, jwt, deviceId)`. Single source of truth for auth status across the app. | nothing |
| 2 | AuthUser | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Models/AuthUser.swift` | todo | nonisolated struct: id (WorkOS sub), email, name, picture URL. Decoded from JWT claims or /user_management response. Codable for Keychain storage. | nothing |
| 3 | AuthTokens | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Models/AuthTokens.swift` | todo | nonisolated struct: accessToken (JWT string), refreshToken (opaque string), expiresAt (Date). Codable for Keychain storage. | nothing |
| 4 | UserTier | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Models/UserTier.swift` | todo | nonisolated enum: `.free`, `.pro`, `.unlimited`. Raw value String, Codable. Returned by `/device/link` and resolved from JWT by backend. | nothing |

### service — Auth logic

| # | Name | File (planned) | Status | Purpose | Depends On |
|---|------|---------------|--------|---------|------------|
| 1 | AuthManager | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Services/AuthManager.swift` | todo | @Observable singleton. Manages full auth lifecycle: OAuth flow via ASWebAuthenticationSession with PKCE, token storage in Keychain, token refresh, sign out, device link/unlink. Exposes `authState: AuthState`, `currentUser: AuthUser?`, `tier: UserTier`. | AuthState, AuthUser, AuthTokens, UserTier, KeychainHelper |
| 2 | KeychainHelper | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Services/KeychainHelper.swift` | todo | Generic Keychain CRUD wrapper. Stores/retrieves Codable types under service "com.tradeguru.electrical.auth". Methods: save<T: Codable>, load<T: Codable>, delete. Used by AuthManager for tokens + user profile. Separate from DeviceManager (which stores device_id only). | nothing |
| 3 | TokenRefresher | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Services/TokenRefresher.swift` | todo | Background token refresh. Checks expiresAt on app foreground (via scenePhase). If within 5 minutes of expiry, calls WorkOS proxy `/user_management/authenticate` with refresh_token grant. Updates AuthManager tokens. If refresh fails, signs user out gracefully. | AuthManager, AuthTokens |

### utility — Helpers

| # | Name | File (planned) | Status | Purpose | Depends On |
|---|------|---------------|--------|---------|------------|
| 1 | PKCEHelper | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Services/PKCEHelper.swift` | todo | Generates PKCE code_verifier (43-128 char random string) and code_challenge (SHA-256 → base64url). Used by AuthManager for OAuth flow. Pure functions, no state. | nothing |
| 2 | JWTDecoder | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Services/JWTDecoder.swift` | todo | Decodes JWT payload without validation (backend validates). Extracts sub, email, name, exp, sid from base64url-encoded payload segment. Used to populate AuthUser from access token without an extra API call. | nothing |

## Build Order

### Phase 1 — Models (no dependencies)
| # | Item | Type | Why first |
|---|------|------|-----------|
| 1 | AuthState | model | Everything checks auth state |
| 2 | AuthUser | model | Represents the signed-in user |
| 3 | AuthTokens | model | JWT + refresh token container |
| 4 | UserTier | model | Free/Pro/Unlimited enum |

### Phase 2 — Utilities (pure functions)
| # | Item | Type | Why now |
|---|------|------|---------|
| 5 | PKCEHelper | utility | AuthManager needs PKCE for OAuth |
| 6 | JWTDecoder | utility | AuthManager needs to extract user from JWT |
| 7 | KeychainHelper | service | AuthManager needs secure storage |

### Phase 3 — Core service
| # | Item | Type | Why now |
|---|------|------|---------|
| 8 | AuthManager | service | Central auth service — everything else depends on it |
| 9 | TokenRefresher | service | Keeps tokens alive in background |
| 10 | APIConfig mod | modification | Inject JWT into all API calls |

### Phase 4 — UI
| # | Item | Type | Why now |
|---|------|------|---------|
| 11 | TierBadgeView | view | Small component needed by SettingsView |
| 12 | SignInView | view | Sign-in options (Google, Apple, Email) |
| 13 | SettingsView | view | Full settings screen |
| 14 | ChatView mod | modification | Gear button to open settings |
| 15 | ChatViewModel mod | modification | Device link after auth |

### Phase 5 — Config + HTML parity
| # | Item | Type | Why now |
|---|------|------|---------|
| 16 | URL scheme registration | config | Required for OAuth redirect |
| 17 | WORKOS_CLIENT_ID injection | config | Required for OAuth URL |
| 18 | OAuth redirect in WorkOS dashboard | config | Required for OAuth to work |
| 19 | HTML settings component | html | Preview parity |
| 20 | HTML nav bar gear | html | Preview parity |

## Environment Requirements

| Variable | Required By | Where To Get It | Status |
|----------|------------|-----------------|--------|
| `WORKOS_CLIENT_ID` | AuthManager (OAuth URL) | WorkOS Dashboard → API Keys → Client ID | todo — already have `EXPO_PUBLIC_WORKOS_CLIENT_ID` on backend, same value |
| `tradeguru://` URL scheme | ASWebAuthenticationSession | Xcode project config or INFOPLIST_KEY_CFBundleURLTypes in pbxproj | todo |
| OAuth redirect URI | WorkOS OAuth flow | WorkOS Dashboard → Redirects → add `tradeguru://auth-callback` | todo — `EXPO_PUBLIC_WORKOS_NATIVE_REDIRECT_URI` already defaults to this |

---

## Security Checklist

| # | Concern | Mitigation |
|---|---------|-----------|
| 1 | JWT stored in plain UserDefaults | Use Keychain with kSecAttrAccessibleAfterFirstUnlock (same as DeviceManager) |
| 2 | Refresh token theft | Keychain-only storage, never logged, never sent to analytics |
| 3 | PKCE code_verifier exposure | Generated per-session, stored temporarily in memory, cleared after token exchange |
| 4 | Token expiry race condition | TokenRefresher checks on scenePhase .active, refreshes if within 5 min of expiry |
| 5 | OAuth callback interception | ASWebAuthenticationSession uses ephemeral browser, prefersEphemeralWebBrowserSession = true |
| 6 | Man-in-middle on token exchange | All calls to tradeguru.com.au over HTTPS, certificate pinning optional |
| 7 | Multiple device limit | Backend enforces max 5 devices per user via Redis Lua script |
| 8 | Sign-out cleanup | Clear Keychain tokens + user, reset AuthState to .anonymous, keep device_id |

---

## Cross-Platform Notes (for future Android)

| Swift | Android Equivalent | Shared |
|-------|--------------------|--------|
| ASWebAuthenticationSession | Chrome Custom Tabs | Same OAuth URL, same redirect flow |
| Keychain (via KeychainHelper) | EncryptedSharedPreferences | Same data format (JSON Codable) |
| PKCEHelper (CryptoKit SHA-256) | java.security.MessageDigest SHA-256 | Same algorithm, same output |
| JWTDecoder (base64url decode) | android.util.Base64 | Same JWT format |
| `tradeguru://auth-callback` | Intent filter for same URI | Same redirect URI in WorkOS |
| AuthManager (@Observable) | ViewModel + StateFlow | Same state machine pattern |
